milestone_title: ATOMIC: Implement subshell dispatch arm + helper extension + 2 fixtures + 2 tests

helper_extension.anchor: Inserted Ruby subshell arm BEFORE the OCaml application_expression arm and BEFORE the generic args-list path
helper_extension.shape: if language == Language::Ruby && descendant.kind() == "subshell" { BFS over named descendants seeking first non-self identifier; skip string_kinds subtrees; return head identifier text via node_text + is_valid_identifier guard; return None if no identifier found }

dispatch_arm.anchor: After the for-pattern-in-patterns.sinks loop closes but BEFORE the `for descendant` loop iteration ends
dispatch_arm.shape: if language == Language::Ruby && descendant.kind() == "subshell" { extract var via 3-fallback chain; if Some(var) push TaintSink with all 5 fields (var, line, sink_type: ShellExec, tainted: false, statement); continue }
dispatch_arm.taint_sink_canonical: Constructed all 5 fields per canonical site at taint.rs:4456-4462 (NOT the plan §5 sketch which omitted `tainted`)

crates/tldr-cli/tests/fixtures/vuln_migr.purpose: NEW FP regression-guard fixture mentioning %x{cmd} inside string literal only

clippy_resolution.issue_encountered: needless_borrow on `text.split('.').next().unwrap_or(&text)` at line 4011 (text is &str, not String)

stop_thresholds.vuln_migration_v1_red_summary: 163 passed; 5 failed (was 160/166; now 163/168 — closes 1 carry-forward, adds 2 new GREEN tests). Remaining 5 RED are deferred Bucket A Rust (4 tests) + 1 Cpp.

loc_delta.total: ~133 LOC, vs plan estimate ~99 LOC (informational; atomic-commit gates are the hard gates)
